title: Store work item evidences as BLOBs in the database

steps.description: Database: EvidencePhase enum + WorkItemEvidence ORM model + Alembic migration (up/down) + FK without cascade + unique key (project,item,phase,filename) + list index (project,item,phase) + docs/IW_AI_Core_Database_Schema.md update
Review S01: enum naming, UUID server_default, FK has NO cascade, unique constraint column order matches upsert expectations, migration round-trip verified, schema doc updated, table count 19→20

Backend: orch/evidences.py pure ingest helper with two-pass oversize check + ON CONFLICT upsert, orch/config.py IW_CORE_EVIDENCE_MAX_BYTES (default 5MB), hook ingest into orch/cli/item_commands.py approve (phase=pre) and orch/cli/step_commands.py step_done (phase=post, gated on browser_verification, after validate_browser_evidence_present)

Review S03: transaction scope wraps status flip + ingest (rollback on oversize), two-pass stat-then-insert ordering, ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE preserves UUID, step_done gated on browser_verification, cwd vs repo_root correctness, symlink/non-regular filtering

API: rewrite dashboard/routers/items.py _list_evidences (DB query + narrow FS fallback: post-only, active-worktree-only, no DB rows) and item_evidence_file (DB lookup → Response(content, media_type=content_type); FS fallback identical scope with existing path-traversal guard preserved)

Review S05: DB-first correctness, FS fallback strictly scoped (no pre-phase fallback, no fallback for merged items), path-traversal guard preserved, content-type taken from DB row (not re-guessed), template contract honored

Tests: tests/unit/test_evidences_ingest.py (helper unit tests — missing dir, empty dir, subdirs, non-regular, two-pass oversize, idempotent upsert, MIME fallback), tests/integration/test_evidences_cli.py (AC1-AC4, AC6, AC8 against testcontainer), tests/dashboard/test_evidences_db_source.py (AC5, AC7, pre-no-fallback, path traversal, content-type fidelity)

Review S07: explicit AC1-AC8 coverage map, byte-identical content assertions (not shape-only), no DB mocking, no live-DB connection, AC6 uses raw DELETE (not ORM cascade), AC7 wires worktree_info correctly, deterministic content

Final cross-layer review: traces AC1-AC8 through the full stack (schema→ingest→CLI→dashboard→test), rollback semantics, template compatibility, docs updates (CLAUDE.md navigation + schema doc), no scope creep beyond File Manifest, no regressions to agents/skills/browser_verification pipeline

QV: Browser verification — fixture seeds DB-only work item with pre+post evidence rows; Evidences tab renders both phases without any on-disk directory; image URL serves bytes with DB-stored Content-Type; archived item (no DB rows, no FS) still renders empty cleanly
